name: launch_claims_app
description: Launch the pre-installed Zava Mutual Claims Workstation with the standard unattended demo flags. `claims.exe` is deployed to the W365A Cloud PC pool via Intune as a required Win32 app, so this tool only verifies the expected install path and starts it. Takes no data arguments: the agent drives the app purely on screen and receives the caller details in its run message, not via a file.
args: $c=@((Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Business Applications\Zava Claims Workstation\claims.exe'),'C:\ZavaClaims\claims.exe'); $f=$c | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $f) { throw "claims.exe is not installed at any expected path: $($c -join ', ')" }; Start-Process $f -ArgumentList '--no-splash','--fast-auth','--stable-host','--idle-timeout=0','--demo-pin=1234'
_paths_note: Prefers the normal Program Files install; falls back to the legacy C:\ZavaClaims path.
